rationale: Stating the definition requires the notion of a well-formed formula: the form 'exists x phi' is asserted to be a wff and phi is required to be a wff. def:wff-pred is therefore a direct, load-bearing stating-dependency and is currently missing; def:variable (already present) types x.
licensing_quote: is a well-formed formula of the form
notes: Expect the sibling def:universal-q to carry def:wff-pred too; if it does, that confirms the omission here is an oversight. The existential quantifier symbol itself is treated as primitive (no separate node), so only variable + wff are attached.
